sentence_transformations_reported_speech.name: sentence transformations reported speech all levels

questions.question: Rewrite as reported speech: Tom said, “I am tired.” Tom said that he {a1}.
Rewrite as a reported yes/no question: “Are you ready?” He asked if I {a1}.
Rewrite the request: “Open the door, please.” She asked me {a1}.
Choose the backshift: “I live here,” she said yesterday. She said that she {a1}.
Rewrite with the correct pronoun: “My bag is here,” Anna said. Anna said that {a1}.
Rewrite with the time change: “I will call tomorrow,” he said. He said that he would call {a1}.
Choose the reporting verb: He {a1} me that the train was late.
Rewrite without question inversion: “Where do you live?” She asked where I {a1}.
Rewrite the command: “Do not wait outside.” Dad told us {a1}.
Preserve the meaning: “I can help,” she said. She said that she {a1}.
Avoid the common mistake: He asked me where {a1}.
